name: Pippin
description: A massive dark-skinned man who wielded an equally massive mace. A former miner, Pippin lent his strength to the old Band of the Hawk. He was often associated with Rickert, who he seemed to share a big-brother relationship with. Before joining the band, he seems to have worked in a mine, which is why he was able to divert a sudden fire in a tunnel during Griffith's rescue.

name: Toshiya Misumi
description: At first Toshi is a mentally fragile weak little boy who can't stand up for himself. He cries for everything and nothing. After he meets Mon, who shows him without mercy how a man could be if he fights for everything he wants, Toshi starts to metamorphose into a much more evil human than Mon. Toshi loses his mind against the thing he turns into and is unable to be any longer a running member of society. He becomes a devil with a fanatical thirst for destruction.

name: Zanoba  Shirone

name: Kohane Azusawa
description: __Height:__ 156 cm (5'1") Azusawa Kohane is a second-year student (introduced as first-year student) at Miyamasuzaka Girls Academy. She's part of the street music group *Vivid BAD SQUAD*. Initially, Kohane was a bashful girl who lacked self-confidence and didn't like being in public. One day, she witnessed a jam session with [An Shiraishi](https://anilist.co/character/262903) and her fellow musicians. She found herself captivated by the rap music and intense tempo of their music.

name: Miles Prower
description: The name "Miles Prower" is a pun on "miles per hour", a reference to the famed speed of the Sonic the Hedgehog series. He is a young, male, golden-yellow, anthropomorphic fox with two tails (similar to the mythological kitsune, or "yoko", which was often depicted with up to nine), hence the nickname.
